description: REQ-TAG-015 specifies that interactive buttons shall use 'Notion Blue (#0075de) for default' and 'Active Blue (#005bab) for hover/pressed'. The '+' button (FeedRow.svelte:295-319) uses #615d59 (not DESIGN.md token) as default color, only changing to #0075de on hover. Additionally, #005bab (Active Blue) is never used anywhere in the tag-related styling. The tag-remove button also uses #097fe8 (tag chip blue) rather than #0075de (Notion Blue).
